query.description: Search query as a URL query string (e.g. "q=test&court=scotus") or a structured dict (e.g. {"q": "test", "court": "scotus"}).

alert_type.description: Optional alert type matching the search `type` in the query: "o" (opinion), "r" (recap), "d" (docket), or "oa" (oral argument). If omitted, the server infers it from the query.
